name: A Plus Brownies
recipeInstructions:
To make base:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and butter; beat until creamy.
2. Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and salt; mix well.
3. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt 1 and 1/4 cups of the mini chocolate chips until smooth.
4. Add the melted chocolate and flour to the first mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 inch square pan and set aside.
To make topping:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and butter; beat until creamy.
2. Add the eggs, milk, flour, and almond extract; beat well.
3. Stir in the remaining 3/4 cup of mini chocolate chips.
4. Pour the mixture over the brownie base.
1. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 to 45 minutes.
2. Cool completely and cut into small pieces. These are very rich, and taste best if chilled.
3. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 16 to 24 brownies.
